case_title: BARRAZA, ROBERTO vs. TASCIAN, HARRY IND. DBA HOME DESIGN CENTER

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARRAZA, ROBERTO AS TO DEFENDANT TASCIAN, HARRY IND. DBA HOME DESIGN CENTER SUMMONS ISSUED
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED NO SUMMONS WAS ISSUED, CLERICAL ERROR

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BARRAZA, ROBERTO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TASCIAN, HARRY IND. DBA HOME DESIGN CENTER $2,210.41 PRINCIPAL, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,293.41
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $9.90 INTEREST, $85.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARRAZA, ROBERTO
